name: Legion Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Legion Memorial Park in Mobridge, SD! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Mobridge pickleball
description: Mobridge pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Mobridge, SD. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
